subcodes.first_line: We have heard Thy call and have answered Thee through this perspicuous Book at this hour when the ocean of Thy Lord's loving-kindness, the All-Merciful, surgeth forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سمعنا ندائک اجبناک بهذا الکتاب المبین فی هذا الحین الذی ماج فیه بحر عنایه ربک الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @presence of; reunion with God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
